name: LensGo Smoke B Fog Machine
description: Generate a unique atmosphere with the all-in-one LENSGO Smoke B, a 40W handheld, battery-powered, wireless mini fog machine designed for the creative needs of photographers, videographers, and content creators.

features.Key Features:: For Photography, Film, TV Special FX | Cinematic Atmosphere in Your Pocket | Dense Fog, Dry Ice, and Steam Effects | Up to 18 Minutes of Smoke Output | Battery-Powered, Battery Included | Includes Six Bottles of Smoke Fluid | Includes Wireless Remote Control | Includes Hose, Tube, and Nozzle Kit | Includes USB-C Charging Cable and Case
features.What’s in the box?: LENSGO Smoke B All-in-One Handheld Mini Fog Machine (40W) | Smoke B Handheld Smoke Machine | 6 x Bottle of Smoke Fluid (12 mL) | Wireless Remote | Silicone Hose | Hard Elbow | Hard Straight Tube | High-Pressure Nozzle | Liquid Smoke Filter | USB-C Charging Cable | Protective Case | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
